body_html:
is this not part of the exchange... if it is not we
will just pay the tax
--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Please advise how you want me to handle this.

Darren

Date: Thu, 05 Jan 2006 16:59:18 -0500
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Art Sale

Darren,
Paul Gray's office just called and said they sold
the DeKooning Woman
Green. They will be wiring $9,900,000 for the sale.
The cost basis is
$2,139,289.33. Before I have them wire the funds,
please ask Jeffrey if he
wants to handle this any differently since there is
such a large gain.
Please let me know as soon as possible.
Thanks.
Peg
